steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Pokedex Go Resource Abuse D…
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Pokedex Go Resource Abuse Defense: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Go team handles case 5513 during a disconnected community-lab recovery drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce destination, terminal, file, privacy, and resource trust boundaries; all goroutines, bodies, signals, timers, and files require named cleanup ownership; then change one catch, owned record, encounter relation, or history state and prove the prior invariant. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Bound command length, response bytes, decoded records, cache, history, collection, concurrency, retries, output, and persistence size.
